Walking With God,
Week by Week

A new 7-day spiritual programme every week — scripture, deep revelation, morning prayer, and daily practices.

This Week's Programme

This Week
Week Seven

Spiritual Disciplines & the Power of Obedience

“So then, just as you received Christ Jesus as Lord, continue to live your lives in him, rooted and built up in him.” — Colossians 2:6–7

The essential building blocks of a strong Christian salvation — daily Bible reading, prayer and worship, solitude, fasting, service, fellowship, and the transforming power of obedience.

Bible & PrayerWorshipSolitude & FastingService & FellowshipObedience & Maturity
Not started4 May 2026
Archive

Previous Weeks

Week Six

Identity, Humility, Forgiveness & Peace

“See what great love the Father has lavished on us, that we should be called children of God.” — 1 John 3:1

Who you are in Christ as the unshakeable foundation, the freedom of limitation, releasing what you were never meant to carry, and the fruit of a settled heart.

Identity in ChristCultivating HumilityForgiveness & GracePeace, Joy & Purpose
Not started27 April 2026
Week Five

The Beatitudes, The Blood & Walking in Purpose

“Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.” — Matthew 5:3

The Beatitudes as a portrait of Christ reproduced in us, the blood that makes each quality possible, and the purpose that flows from a transformed life.

The BeatitudesThe Blood of JesusWalking in Purpose
Not started20 April 2026
Week Four

Confession, Repentance, Holy Living & Trust

“If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us.” — 1 John 1:9

The gift of honest confession, repentance as a complete turning, holiness in the ordinary, and the armour of God for every battle.

Confession & RepentanceHoly LivingGod in the BattleTrust & Overcoming
Not started13 April 2026
Easter Week

The Cross, The Tomb & The Resurrection

“He is not here; he has risen, just as he said.” — Matthew 28:6

Sitting with the full weight of the cross before rushing to Sunday. The descent, the silence of Holy Saturday, and the world-changing reality of resurrection.

The CrossThe TombThe ResurrectionSent as Witnesses
Not started6 April 2026
Week Two

The Fear of God & Walking in Purpose

“The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom.” — Proverbs 9:10

Holy awe as the foundation of wisdom, being known by name before time began, and walking in the purpose God prepared in advance.

Fear of the LordKnown & CalledPurpose & Reverence
Not started30 March 2026
Week One

Fresh Starts, Strength & Peace

“See, I am doing a new thing! Now it springs up; do you not perceive it?” — Isaiah 43:19

A week anchored in God's ability to make all things new, the strength that comes from waiting on Him, and the peace that follows surrender.

Fresh StartsConfidence & StrengthPeace & Guidance
Not started23 March 2026
